tasks.subject: Task 1: src/session.ts — VisomaSession cookie-jar client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `VisomaSession` with Yii login, cookie-jar management, and form-encoded POSTs.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/session.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `VisomaSession` and `SessionExpiredError` exported
- [ ] `login()` GETs /site/login, extracts CSRF, POSTs credentials, stores Set-Cookie
- [ ] `login()` throws if POST response is not HTTP 302
- [ ] `ensureLoggedIn()` lazy + idempotent
- [ ] `postForm()` sends correct Content-Type and X-Requested-With headers
- [ ] `postForm()` auto-appends `_csrf` from cookie jar if present
- [ ] `postForm()` throws `SessionExpiredError` on 302 → /site/login (checks Location header)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/session.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VisomaSession exported", "SessionExpiredError exported", "login() handles CSRF and 302", "postForm() sends correct headers", "npm run build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: src/tools/ghostwriter.ts — four new Ghostwriter tools
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ghostwriter_get_pending, set_ghostwriter_article, ghostwriter_close_timers, ghostwriter_release_timers to ghostwriter tool module.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/tools/ghostwriter.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] registerGhostwriterTools accepts session: VisomaSession second param
- [ ] ghostwriter_get_pending client-side filters ininvoice===0, QueryLimit default 500
- [ ] set_ghostwriter_article calls session.postForm with pk/name/value
- [ ] ghostwriter_close_timers two-step closewithoutinvoice, parses ticketids[] (no type restriction), retries once on SessionExpiredError
- [ ] ghostwriter_release_timers two-step addtoque, HTML-entity-decodes Ghostwriter[amounts], retries once on SessionExpiredError
- [ ] Both two-step tools accept optional returnUrl (default "6a0ada08876a2")
- [ ] npm run build succeeds

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/tools/ghostwriter.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registerGhostwriterTools(server, session) signature", "ghostwriter_get_pending with client-side filter", "set_ghostwriter_article", "ghostwriter_close_timers two-step", "ghostwriter_release_timers two-step with HTML-entity-decode"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire session into src/index.ts and update .env.example
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create VisomaSession singleton, inject into registerGhostwriterTools, document 2FA service account in .env.example.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/index.ts`
- Modify: `.env.example`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] VisomaSession imported and instantiated in src/index.ts
- [ ] registerGhostwriterTools(server, session) called with session
- [ ] All other registerX(server) calls unchanged
- [ ] .env.example USERNAME/PASSWORD comment mentions service account + 2FA disabled
- [ ] npm run build succeeds

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/index.ts", ".env.example"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VisomaSession instance in index.ts", "registerGhostwriterTools called with session", "2FA note in .env.example", "npm run build succeeds"]}
```
